title: Priority Pulse Field
prompt:
Create a production-ready Priority Pulse Field using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original input gives a task a clear priority from one through three using a compact labelled radio group and a short explanatory sentence. Keep the visual system light and Bento-like: white panel on #F4F5F6, 22px corners, #ECECEE border, soft shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F supporting copy. Use coral for the active pulse and no more than one other bright accent. The panel itself must not use a gradient.

Use native radio inputs or an equivalent correctly labelled radiogroup. Every choice must be at least 44px tall, reachable by keyboard, and visibly focused. Arrow keys, Space, and click change the current priority; announce the resulting label through a polite live region. Animate the active coral pulse with a stiffness 340, damping 27 spring and fade the explanatory sentence over 150ms ease-out. Keep a meaningful medium priority selected during server rendering. Do not use timers, random values, external data, browser storage, network calls, or remote assets.

The field must fit a 320px compact preview without horizontal scrolling and expand naturally in a large detail preview. Maintain AA contrast, clear labels that do not rely on color, semantic form structure, and logical tab order. Use transform and opacity where possible. For prefers-reduced-motion, use a stable active marker and at most a 120ms fade. Return a complete copyable client component followed by a runnable pure CSS approximation and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML: <fieldset class="priority-pulse"><label><input type="radio" checked>Medium</label></fieldset> */
.priority-pulse{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.priority-pulse label{display:inline-flex;width:31%;min-height:44px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;font-weight:800}.priority-pulse input{accent-color:#f97360}.priority-pulse label:has(input:checked){border:2px solid #111;background:#fff0ec}.priority-pulse input:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.priority-pulse *{transition:none}}

demoCode:
(() => {function Demo(){const [n,setN]=React.useState(1),x=[['Low','Can wait until planning'],['Medium','Keep it in this week’s review'],['High','Needs attention before handoff']];return
Task priority
{x.map((r,i)=>)}

{x[n][0]}: {x[n][1]}

}return ;})()
